{{Quote|It was like flying in a fishbowl being chased by buzzfish.|[[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], on flying through the [[Death Star II/Legends|Death Star reactor]] at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]|<ref name="X-Wing Rogue Squadron 1">[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 1|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 1]]</ref>}}
The '''buzzfish''' was a [[Diet/Legends#Animals|predatory]] [[Fish/Legends|fish]] [[Species/Legends|species]] found on [[Endor/Legends|Endor]].

==Behind the scenes==
Buzzfish appeared in the video game ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a massively multiplayer online role-playing game developed by [[Sony]] and published by LucasArts, prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].

*{{GalaxiesAED}} {{1st}}
